name: ctranslate2

scripts.build: pnpm --package=@napi-rs/cli dlx napi build --platform --release --config-path ./napi.config.json --js binding.js && pnpm exec prettier --write ./binding.js ./index.d.ts
scripts.dev: pnpm --package=@napi-rs/cli dlx napi build --platform --config-path ./napi.config.json --js binding.js && pnpm exec prettier --write ./binding.js ./index.d.ts

// napi-config-note: The runnable NAPI-RS target matrix lives in napi.config.json so build/release automation can consume one truth without fighting package.json comments.
// binary-note: Keep the generated loader on binding.js and reserve index.js for the handwritten runtime law that checks the supported matrix before loading native code.
// publish-note: This package only publishes the handwritten entrypoint plus generated ct2.* runtime files. Stale local index.* artifacts must never be matched by the tarball file list.
